summary: Implemented the Stage 7C non-live worker orchestration guard that prepares launches, invokes an injected backend, parses diff-summary evidence, and rejects completed results with out-of-scope changes.

tests_run.command: uv run --no-sync python -B -m pytest tests/test_worker_orchestration.py -q -p no:cacheprovider

tests_run.summary: 280 passed plus Ruff, format, mypy, CLI smoke checks, file justification, public hygiene, planning integrity, skill inventory, source inventory, protected locks, and uv lock --check.

Orchestration uses prepare_worker_launch.evidence: orchestrate_worker_launch delegates path and request construction to prepare_worker_launch_request, then calls the supplied backend once with the exact prepared WorkerLaunchRequest.

Diff-summary changed files are parsed an.evidence: load_diff_summary_changed_files reads newline-delimited changed paths from the prepared diff summary, validate_changed_files checks them against task allowed_paths, and completed results with violations are rewritten to failed with failure_class changed_paths_out_of_scope.

Backend failures preserve their original.evidence: Non-completed backend results are not rewritten to changed_paths_out_of_scope; the orchestrator preserves the backend failure_class and adds changed_path_violations metadata when the diff summary is out of scope.

Focused tests cover successful injected.evidence: tests/test_worker_orchestration.py covers successful injected CodexExecBackend execution through a spy backend, completed out-of-scope diff rejection, codex_exec_failed preservation with violations, and WorktreeArtifactError for unsafe worker_run_id.

risks: Stage 7C remains explicitly non-live: it invokes only supplied backend objects and uses injected command runners in tests.
No real git worktree lifecycle or cleanup has been enabled yet; future slices should keep cleanup behind path containment guards.
Local live Codex Exec remains unavailable until the resolved WindowsApps codex.exe access-denied issue and intended CODEX_HOME are confirmed.
follow_up_tasks: Shape the next Stage 7 slice to persist orchestration outputs into planning worker-run metadata and result ingestion through typed helpers.
Add non-live worktree lifecycle command planning before enabling real git worktree add/remove or cleanup.
handoff_notes: Stage 7C adds worker_orchestration.py as the guard between WorkerLaunchPreparation, backend execution, and planning ingestion. Future orchestration should call orchestrate_worker_launch and honor its changed_path_violations before accepting a completed worker result.
